title: adenandra calycina
intro: Adenandra calycina, also known as the white star flower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Adenandra calycina include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
